CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'SaaS', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), SaaS_Activation_Override_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Activation_Override_Stamp__c)), SaaS_Activation_Override_Stamp__c, Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Activation_Override__c ) ), '' )
CustomField.label: SaaS Activation Override
